findings.message: PII logged: owner_email (an email address) is written to the application log in the item_created event. The model in db/models.py explicitly annotates owner_email as PII that must not be included in logs. Email addresses in logs create a durable, replicated copy of personal data outside its purpose and are a data-protection/retention risk.
findings.suggestion: Remove owner_email from the log call. Log only non-PII identifiers, e.g. log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id). If owner attribution in audit logs is required, log a non-reversible reference (e.g. a hashed owner id) rather than the raw email.
